identities.canonicalName: Encryption in transit and at rest

domains.name: Audit
domains.description: The systematic process of obtaining and evaluating evidence to express an independent opinion on financial statements or specified subject matter

domains.name: Financial Reporting
domains.description: The preparation, presentation, and disclosure of financial information for stakeholders in accordance with applicable frameworks

domains.name: IFRS
domains.description: Application of International Financial Reporting Standards to recognition, measurement, presentation, and disclosure

domains.name: ISA
domains.description: Application of International Standards on Auditing to planning, evidence, evaluation, and reporting on audit engagements

domains.name: Risk Management
domains.description: Identification, assessment, response, and monitoring of risks that may affect financial reporting and organizational objectives

domains.name: Internal Controls
domains.description: Design, implementation, and effectiveness of controls over financial reporting and operational processes

domains.name: Governance
domains.description: Structures and processes by which organizations are directed and controlled, including board and committee oversight

domains.name: Compliance
domains.description: Adherence to laws, regulations, contractual obligations, and internal policies

domains.name: AI Analysis
domains.description: Intelligent analysis of financial and unstructured data with evidence-backed outputs and professional oversight

domains.name: Knowledge Management
domains.description: Capture, organization, and retrieval of firm and engagement knowledge including methodology, precedents, and guidance

domains.name: Document Management
domains.description: Governed storage, versioning, indexing, and retrieval of engagement and reporting documents

domains.name: Financial Intelligence
domains.description: Analytical interpretation of financial data for insight, trend identification, and decision support

domains.name: Reporting
domains.description: Production of formatted outputs — financial statements, management reports, board packs, and regulatory submissions

domains.name: Analytics
domains.description: Quantitative analysis of financial and operational data including variance, ratio, and trend analysis

domains.name: Enterprise Administration
domains.description: Organization, workspace, user, permission, and system configuration management

modules.name: Foundation
modules.description: Core platform services shared by all modules: tenancy context, event logging, configuration management, notification framework, and shared business object definitions

modules.name: Organizations
modules.description: Top-level tenant structure representing a firm, enterprise, or institution — subscription boundary, global policies, and owner administration

modules.name: Companies
modules.description: Legal entities and reporting units within an organization; supports group structures, subsidiaries, and branch hierarchies

modules.name: Users
modules.description: User identity, profile, role assignment, and organizational membership within the platform

modules.name: Authentication
modules.description: Secure identity verification, session management, and access control enforcement at platform entry

modules.name: Financial Data Import
modules.description: Ingestion of financial data from ERP systems, spreadsheets, and external feeds with source preservation and validation

modules.name: General Ledger
modules.description: Representation and exploration of imported general ledger transactions as the foundation for trial balance and analysis

modules.name: Trial Balance
modules.description: Period-end trial balance management including adjustments, reclassifications, and approval workflows

modules.name: IFRS Classification
modules.description: Mapping and classification of accounts and balances in accordance with IFRS presentation and disclosure requirements

modules.name: Financial Statements
modules.description: Composition, versioning, and approval of primary financial statements (statement of financial position, profit or loss, cash flows, changes in equity)

modules.name: IFRS Notes
modules.description: Preparation, linkage, and versioning of financial statement notes and disclosures

modules.name: Audit Engine
modules.description: Core audit engagement lifecycle: acceptance, planning, fieldwork, completion, and archive

modules.name: Working Papers
modules.description: Structured documentation of audit procedures, findings, and conclusions with review and sign-off

modules.name: Lead Sheets
modules.description: Summary schedules linking trial balance amounts to detailed testing and supporting analysis

modules.name: Risk Library
modules.description: Catalog of audit and entity risk factors, assessment criteria, and firm-defined risk guidance

modules.name: Audit Planning
modules.description: Risk assessment, materiality, strategy, resource planning, and audit program generation

modules.name: Audit Opinion
modules.description: Formation, review, and issuance of the auditor's report and related opinion documentation

modules.name: Governance
modules.description: Board and audit committee oversight, management representations, and governance reporting

modules.name: Control Framework
modules.description: Documentation and testing of internal controls over financial reporting

modules.name: Financial Intelligence
modules.description: Executive and management analytics with drill-down to source evidence

modules.name: Reporting
modules.description: Output generation across financial, audit, and management report types

modules.name: AI Auditor
modules.description: AI-assisted audit procedures: evidence retrieval, anomaly surfacing, draft working paper generation, and risk indicators — all evidence-cited

modules.name: Knowledge Base
modules.description: Firm and engagement knowledge repository including methodology, guidance, and precedents

modules.name: RAG
modules.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation engine providing permission-filtered, evidence-grounded context to AI capabilities

modules.name: Enterprise
modules.description: Organization-wide administration: workspaces, billing, integrations, compliance settings, and platform configuration

capabilities.name: Multi-source data import

capabilities.name: IFRS classification
capabilities.description: Classify accounts and balances per IFRS presentation requirements

capabilities.name: Data lineage

capabilities.name: Engagement lifecycle management

capabilities.name: Audit program execution

capabilities.description: Generate draft narratives and procedures for professional review

capabilities.description: Natural language queries answered with retrieved evidence

capabilities.description: Log all prompts, retrievals, outputs, and user accept/reject decisions
